messages.body: Hi Amika. Hi Najwa. How are you? I'm good. How are you? I'm so sorry. I think I missed your call. I'm just giving you a call back. Okay. Thank you for calling. Just, um, you remember last time when we talked about the we…

Hi. Please contact me ASAP  480-202-4034.  Thank you
